meaning: 談判中一方對另一方所做的條款或條件的預期最終聲明。

meaning: 極端;遠遠超出正常範圍；狂熱的；不妥協的。

meaning: 超出（頻率高於）人耳可感知的聲音範圍；頻率為 20 kHz 或更高。

meaning: 與非常高的能量或非常小的距離或時間跨度有關。
sentences: Something described as ultraviolet is relating to very high energies or very small distances or time spans. 被描述為紫外線的東西與非常高的能量或非常小的距離或時間跨度有關。

meaning: 主持棒球比賽的官員之一。
sentences: The umpire called the pitch a strike. 裁判員稱本場比賽為罷工。

an unavoidable urge 不可避免的衝動

meaning: 不死生物；也就是說，死了但仍然活著。

meaning: 自己的工作獲得的經濟補償太少。

meaning: 下方或下方的一側、底部。
sentences: The term underside refers to the side that is below or underneath, the bottom. 術語「底面」是指位於底部下方或下方的側面。
The lesson introduced underside as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 underside 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
I don't quite understand what you mean. Could you explain it again? 我不太明白你的意思。你能再解釋一次嗎？
Do you understand the instructions for the assignment? 你明白這項作業的說明嗎？

meaning: 出於容易理解或同情的原因。
sentences: Understandably, he was too embarrassed to speak. 可以理解的是，他不好意思說話。
Embarrassed, he understandably refused to speak. 他感到尷尬，拒絕說話，這是可以理解的。

meaning: 非正式 合約; 協議 。
sentences: I thought we had an understanding - you do the dishes, and I throw the trash. 我以為我們有 默契 －你洗碗，我丟垃圾。 我以為我們達成了共識──你洗碗，我丟垃圾。 我以為我們有默契──你洗碗，我丟垃圾。
The term understanding refers to An informal contract; a mutual agreement. 理解一詞是指 非正式 合約; 協議 。 「諒解」一詞指非正式合約；共同協議。 理解採購是指合約； 協議。

meaning: 此類措詞或缺乏強調的實例；不完整的陳述。
sentences: Now that's an understatement. 現在這是輕描淡寫的說法。
The term understatement refers to An instance of such phrasing or lack of emphasis; an incomplete statement. 輕描淡寫一詞是指這種措詞或缺乏強調的例子；不完整的陳述。
The word understood is used in English writing and speech. 「理解」這個詞用於英語寫作和演講。
The lesson explained how to use understood in context. 本課解釋如何在上下文中使用「理解」。
The company decided to undertake a major research project next year. 公司決定進行（承擔）一項重大的研究專案。
He undertook to finish the work by the end of the week, but he failed. 他答應（承諾）在本週末前完成工作，但沒能做到。
The family met with the undertaker to discuss the funeral arrangements. 家人與殯葬業者見面討論葬禮安排。
An undertaker plays a crucial role in supporting grieving families. 殯葬業者在支持悲傷家庭方面發揮著關鍵作用。

meaning: 在水面下；屬於或關於水面以下的區域。
sentences: Watch out for underwater obstacles. 留意水下障礙物。
He was a pioneer in underwater exploration. 他是水下探索的先驅。
The project is currently underway and is expected to finish soon.
Preparations for the annual festival are already well underway.
You should always pack enough clean underwear for your trip. 妳去旅行時一定要帶夠乾淨的內衣。

He's so underweight he's had to buy smaller clothes. 他體重太輕，只好買更小的衣服。
He's thirty pounds underweight. 他體重減輕了三十磅。

meaning: 死者世界，位於生者世界之下；來世。
sentences: In Hindu scriptures, the four-eyed dogs Śārvara and Śyāma guard the underworld's entrance. 在印度教經典中，四眼狗 Śāvara 和 Śyāma 守護著地獄的入口。
The term underworld refers to the world of the dead, located underneath the world of the living; the afterlife. 陰間一詞是指位於生者世界之下的死者世界。來世。

meaning: 不受歡迎、令人反感或不太可能取悅。
sentences: Something described as undesirable is not desirable, objectionable or not likely to please. 被描述為不受歡迎的事物是不受歡迎的、令人反感的或不太可能讓人滿意的。
The word undesirable is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「不受歡迎」這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。
It took him several minutes to undo the complex knot in the rope. 他花了幾分鐘才解開繩子上複雜的結。
You can easily undo your last action by clicking on the 'back' button. 您可以通過點擊「返回」按鈕輕鬆撤銷上一步操作。

The report describes the result as undocumented. 該報告稱該結果沒有記錄。

meaning: 廢墟;失敗，導致失敗或毀滅的事物。
sentences: In the end, his jealousy was his undoing. 最終，他的嫉妒導致了他的毀滅。
The term undoing refers to Ruin; defeat, that which causes defeat or ruin. 「毀滅」一詞指的是毀滅；失敗，導致失敗或毀滅的事物。

Something described as undone is ruined; brought to nought. 被描述為「undone」的事情被毀掉了；化為烏有。

The new policy will undoubtedly lead to significant social changes. 新政策無疑（確實）會導致重大的社會變革。

meaning: 現在更具體地說，是一種 衣服 很少或沒有穿的狀態。
sentences: She returned to her dorm to find her roommate, fresh out of the shower, in a state of undress. 她回到宿舍，發現室友剛洗完澡， 脫衣服 。 她回到宿舍，發現室友剛洗完澡，脫光了衣服。 她回到宿舍，發現室友剛洗完澡，脫衣服。
The term undress refers to Now more specifically, a state of having few or no clothes on. 更具體地說，「脫衣」一詞是指一種 衣服 很少或沒有穿的狀態。 更具體地說，「脫衣服」一詞是指一種幾乎不穿衣服或不穿衣服的狀態。 更具體地說，「脫衣」是指一件衣服很少或不穿的狀態。

meaning: 過度；超越自然或充分的範圍。
sentences: To individuals who despise killings in any form, death penalty is undue punishment. 對於鄙視任何形式殺戮的人來說，死刑都是不適當的懲罰。
Something described as undue is excessive; going beyond that what is natural or sufficient. 被描述為不適當的事情是過度的；超越自然或充分的範圍。

meaning: 不值得的；以一種沒有保證的方式。
sentences: The speaker unduly criticized his opponent and later apologized for this. 演講者過度批評了他的對手，後來為此道歉。
The team responded unduly to the change. 該團隊對這一變化反應過度。

meaning: 麻煩;苦難;不安或擔憂的感覺。
sentences: The term unease refers to Trouble; misery; a feeling of disquiet or concern. 不安這個字指的是麻煩；苦難;不安或擔憂的感覺。

An uneasy silence fell over the room after the argument. 爭吵過後，房間裡陷入了一種不自在的沈默。
He has been unemployed for six months and is actively looking for a job. 他已經失業六個月了，目前正積極找工作。
The government provides support for people who are currently unemployed. 政府為目前失業的人提供支援。
The country is currently facing high levels of unemployment among young people. 該國目前正面臨嚴重的年輕人失業問題。
The government is introducing new measures to reduce unemployment and boost growth. 政府正在推行新措施以減少失業（人數）並刺激增長。

meaning: 不足；能力不足或資格不足。
sentences: unequal to the task 與任務不平等
Something described as unequal is inadequate; insufficiently capable or qualified. 被描述為不平等的東西是不充分的；能力或資格不足。

meaning: 明確；毫不含糊或含糊；非常清楚、明確無誤或不容置疑
sentences: I want you to give me an unequivocal guarantee on that. 我希望你對此給予我明確的保證。
The report describes the result as unequivocal. 報告將結果描述為明確的。

meaning: 以一種毫無疑問的方式；毫無疑問，以明確或明確的方式。
sentences: They strove to make their product unequivocally the best in the industry. 他們努力使自己的產品成為業內最好的產品。
The team responded unequivocally to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了明確的回應。

meaning: 違反特定組織或職業內既定的行為或行為標準。
sentences: He was sacked for unethical conduct. 他因不道德行為而被解僱。
The report describes the result as unethical. 報告稱這一結果是不道德的。

meaning: 表面，不平坦；佈滿凸起的斑點、凹坑和凹槽。
sentences: Something described as uneven is of a surface, not even; covered with raised spots, pits and grooves. 被描述為不平坦的東西是表面的，而不是平坦的；佈滿凸起的斑點、凹坑和凹槽。
The word uneven is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 不均勻這個詞常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 沒有解釋；原因或來源不明。
sentences: The report describes the result as unexplained. 報告稱該結果無法解釋。

It was unfair for the boss to give larger bonuses to his friends. 老闆給朋友多發獎金，這是不公平的。

The carnival games were unfairly difficult, and hardly anybody won a prize. 嘉年華比賽異常艱難，幾乎沒有人獲獎。

meaning: 一個不熟悉的人；一個陌生人。
sentences: The term unfamiliar refers to an unfamiliar person; a stranger. 陌生一詞是指不熟悉的人；一個陌生人。

meaning: 無法理解。尤其是深度：物理上無法測量；無法估量的。
sentences: The sheer number of warriors the enemy attacked with was unfathomable. 敵人攻擊的戰士數量之多，難以估量。
The report describes the result as unfathomable. 報告稱這項結果令人難以理解。
Something described as unfavorable is uS standard spelling of unfavourable. 被描述為“不利”的事物是“不利”的美國標準拼寫。
The word unfavorable is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 不利這個詞通常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 沒有完成。未完成；未解決。
sentences: The report describes the result as unfinished. 報告稱該結果尚未完成。
Everyone noticed the unfinished tone of the message. 所有人都注意到了消息未說完的語氣。

meaning: 不適合；沒有正確的要求。
sentences: Jack cannot run, making him unfit for the track team. 傑克不能跑步，這使他不適合參加田徑隊。
Something described as unfit is not fit; not having the correct requirements. 形容不適合的東西，就是不適合；沒有正確的要求。

unforeseen catastrophe 不可預見的災難
unforeseen consequences 不可預見的後果

meaning: 非常 困難 或 不可能 到<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="ti="/forget"。
sentences: The things he subjected me to were horrible and unforgettable. 他讓我經歷的事情非常可怕並且 令人難忘 。 他讓我經歷的事情是可怕而難忘的。 他讓我經歷了非常可怕且令人難忘的事。
The report describes the result as unforgettable. 報告稱這項結果令人難忘。 報告稱這項結果令人難忘。 報告稱這令人難忘。
People who smuggle artifacts, blood diamonds and ivory trinkets on the black market are unforgivable in my mind. 在黑市上走私文物、血鑽和象牙飾品的人在我看來是不可原諒的。
The report describes the result as unforgivable. 報告稱這一結果是不可原諒的。

meaning: 不願意或無法原諒或表現出憐憫。
sentences: The electorate was in an unforgiving mood. 選民的情緒不太樂觀。

It is unfortunate that we couldn't reach an agreement today. 很遺憾我們今天沒能達成協議。

meaning: 因運氣不佳或因某些不幸事件而發生。
sentences: He unfortunately placed his hand on a loose brick. 不幸的是，他的手放在了一塊鬆動的磚頭上。
There were an unfortunately large number of misprints. 不幸的是，有大量印刷錯誤。

meaning: 沒有紮實的基礎；沒有基於充分的理由或事實。
sentences: an unfounded report; unfounded fears 毫無根據的報告；毫無根據的恐懼
The report describes the result as unfounded. 報告稱此結果毫無根據。

meaning: 缺乏成就感；以無法實現目標或願望的感覺為特徵。
sentences: The report describes the result as unfulfilled. 報告稱結果未實現。
Everyone noticed the unfulfilled tone of the message. 所有人都注意到了這則訊息的語氣。

meaning: 不道德的、有罪的或邪惡的。
sentences: People often turn to ungodly ideas as an emotional response to trauma. 人們常常將不敬虔的想法當作對創傷的情緒反應。
The report describes the result as ungodly. 報告稱這一結果是不合理的。

meaning: 不感恩；不表達感激之情。
sentences: Something described as ungrateful is not grateful; not expressing gratitude. 所謂忘恩負義，就是不懂得感恩；不表達感激之情。

meaning: 以健康狀況不佳為特徵或導致健康狀況不佳。
sentences: The villagers lived in unhealthy surroundings. 村民生活環境惡劣。
Something described as unhealthy is characterized by, or conducive to poor health. 被描述為不健康的事物的特徵是健康狀況不佳，或導致健康狀況不佳。
There are no "bad" emotions; rather, there are only heard emotions and unheard emotions. 沒有「壞」情緒；相反，只有聽到的情緒和未聽到的情緒。
Something described as unheard is not listened to. 被描述為聞所未聞的事情是沒有被聽到的。

meaning: 不提供幫助或幫助；沒有幫助。
sentences: Even if you are genuinely a victim, having a victim mentality is unhelpful because it is disempowering. ― Ned Kelly, "NFL Players Are Setting A Bad Example By Teaching Black People To Encourage Victimhood", 8th of October 2017 即使你確實是受害者，擁有受害者心態也是無濟於事的，因為它會削弱你的力量。 ——內德·凱利，“NFL 球員通過教導黑人鼓勵受害者樹立了壞榜樣”，2017 年 10 月 8 日
The report describes the result as unhelpful. 報告稱這項結果毫無幫助。

meaning: 不聖潔；邪惡的、不純潔的或其他變態的。
sentences: The priest's unholy behaviour brought the church into disrepute. 牧師的不聖潔行為使教會名譽掃地。
Something described as unholy is not holy; evil, impure, or otherwise perverted. 被描述為不神聖的東西並不神聖；邪惡的、不純潔的或其他變態的。

meaning: 有多種（尤其是柔和的）顏色；五彩的。
sentences: unicorn smoothies 獨角獸冰沙
The term unicorn refers to being many (especially pastel) colours; multicoloured. 獨角獸一詞指的是多種（尤其是柔和的）顏色；多彩多姿的。
The unification of the two small states led to increased stability.
The project aims to promote the unification of the local community.
The students are required to wear their school uniforms every day. 學生被要求每天穿校服。

A uniformed chauffeur collected us for the party. 一位 穿制服 的司機來接我們參加派對。 一位穿著制服的司機接我們去參加派對。 一位穿著制服的司機來接我們參加派對。
The report describes the result as uniformed. 報告將結果描述為統一的。 報告將結果描述為統一的。 報告將結果描述為統一的。
The uniformity of the decor 裝修的統一性
The term uniformity refers to the quality or state of being uniform. 術語“均勻性”是指均勻的質量或狀態。
The leader tried to unify the different factions within the party.
The program aims to unify the diverse groups through culture and art.
Something described as unilateral is affecting only one side of the body. 被描述為單側的東西只影響身體的一側。
The word unilateral is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 單方面這個字常用來描述人、事或情況。

meaning: 以單方面或片面的方式。
sentences: If someone acts unilaterally, they do so in a way that is in a unilateral or one-sided way. 如果有人單方面行動，他們就會以單方面或片面的方式這樣做。
The speaker responded unilaterally during the discussion. 發言者在討論中單方面作出回應。

meaning: 無法想像；不可思議的或令人難以置信的；難以置信。
sentences: Something described as unimaginable is unable to be imagined; inconceivable or mind-boggling; beyond belief. 形容為不可思議的事情是無法想像的；不可思議的或令人難以置信的；難以置信。
The word unimaginable is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 難以想像這個詞常被用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 瑣碎的；不重要或值得注意。
sentences: Something described as unimportant is petty; not important or noteworthy. 形容不重要的事，就是小事；形容不重要的事，就是小事。不重要或值得注意。
The word unimportant is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 不重要這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 尚未發起；不具備特定群體的特殊知識。
sentences: His jargon-filled talk was gibberish to uninitiated listeners, but it was clear and concise to practitioners. 他的講法滿是行話，對不懂的人來說是胡言亂語，但對修行者來說卻是清晰簡潔。
The report describes the result as uninitiated. 報告稱這項結果是未經始發的。

meaning: 不感興趣；漠不關心，不關心。
sentences: I was uninterested in the TV program, so I read a book instead. 我對電視節目不感興趣，所以我看書。
The report describes the result as uninterested. 報告稱這項結果不感興趣。

meaning: 很少或根本不引起興趣；無聊或平淡。
sentences: The report describes the result as uninteresting. 報告稱此結果無趣。

The workers decided to form a trade union to protect rights. 工人們決定成立工會（聯盟）以保護權利。

meaning: 屬於或關於工會主義（任何意義上）。
sentences: Something described as unionist is of or pertaining to unionism (in any sense). 被描述為工會主義者的東西屬於工會主義或與工會主義有關（在任何意義上）。

a uniquely gifted musician 一位具有獨特天賦的音樂家
components that are uniquely numbered for identification 具有唯一編號以便識別的組件

meaning: 和諧或一致的狀態；和諧一致或團結、同步。

Something described as unsure is uncertain, ambivalent. 被描述為不確定的事物是不確定的、矛盾的。
He easily shot the unsuspecting target. 他輕鬆地射中了毫無戒心的目標。
The report describes the result as unsuspecting. 報告稱這一結果是毫無疑問的。

meaning: 無法堅持或維持，例如觀點或立場。
sentences: The theory of cold fusion was untenable. 冷聚變理論是站不住腳的。
The report describes the result as untenable. 報告稱這一結果站不住腳。

meaning: 難以想像或難以想的；以違反常識的方式極不可能。
sentences: Nothing is unthinkable, nothing impossible to the balanced person, provided it comes out of the needs of life and is dedicated to life's further development - Lewis Mumford 對於平衡的人來說，沒有什麼是不可想像的，沒有什麼是不可能的，只要它來自生活的需要，並致力於生活的進一步發展——路易斯·芒福德
Something described as unthinkable is inconceivable or unimaginable; extremely improbable in a way that goes against common sense. 形容為unthinkable的事物是不可思議的或難以想像的；以違反常識的方式極為不可能。
Please wait here until I come back from the meeting. 請在這裡等我開會回來。
I'll be busy until the end of this month. 我會一直忙到這個月底。
an untimely death 英年早逝
Something described as untimely is early; premature. 形容不合時宜的事，形容為時過早；還為時過早。

meaning: 直至達到以下程度或時間；直到。
sentences: Unto This Last (John Ruskin) 到最後（約翰·羅斯金）
The word unto is used to connect ideas in a sentence. to 這個字用來連結句子中的想法。

meaning: 沒有告訴；不相關；沒有透露；秘密。
sentences: Something described as untold is not told; not related; not revealed; secret. 被描述為不為人知的事物並未被講述；不相關；沒有透露；秘密。
The word untold is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「不為人知」這個字常被用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。
The Minnesota Vikings have been untouchable this year as they've won their sixth consecutive game. 明尼蘇達維京人隊今年已經取得了連續第六場比賽的勝利，這是不可撼動的。
The report describes the result as untouchable. 報告稱這一結果是不可動搖的。

meaning: 保持其原始、原始狀態、未損壞；沒有改變。
sentences: There are practically no untouched forests left in Europe. 歐洲幾乎沒有未受破壞的森林。
The report describes the result as untouched. 報告稱結果未受影響。
She says that I stole her necklace, but that's completely untrue. 她說我偷了她的項鍊，但這完全是不真實的。
Something described as untrue is false; not true. 被描述為不真實的事物是虛假的；不正確。
I am unused to the dark nights of the countryside. 我不習慣鄉村的黑夜。
The report describes the result as unused. 該報告將結果描述為未使用。
Every once in a while, though, Idol comes across an unusual talent who just blows everyone away. 不過，每隔一段時間，《偶像》就會遇到一位不尋常的天才，讓所有人驚嘆不已。
It’s definitely not unusual for a couple to meet through friends or be set up on a date. 情侶透過朋友認識或安排約會絕對不是什麼罕見的事情。
She's unusually happy for someone who's just broken her leg. 她為一個剛剛摔斷腿的人感到異常高興。
If someone acts unusually, they do so in a way that is in an unusual manner. 如果某人的行為不尋常，那麼他們就會以不尋常的方式這樣做。
The famous architect is planning to unveil his new building design soon.
The government decided to unveil the new economic policy early today.

meaning: 笨重難操作的；難以控制或處理的。
sentences: The box was too unwieldy for one person to carry upstairs. 那個箱子太笨重，一個人很難搬上樓。
As the company grew, its old filing system became unwieldy. 隨著公司擴大，舊的歸檔系統變得難以管理。
We are unwilling to restore his previous privileges after his betrayal of our trust. 在他背叛了我們的信任後，我們不願意恢復他以前的特權。
The report describes the result as unwilling. 報告稱這一結果是不情願的。

meaning: 放鬆；放鬆；休息並緩解壓力。
sentences: After work, I like to unwind by smoking a pipe while reading the paper. 下班後，我喜歡一邊讀報紙一邊抽煙鬥來放鬆。
To unwind means to relax; to chill out; to rest and become relieved of stress. 放鬆意味著放鬆；放鬆一下；休息並緩解壓力。
unwise kings 不明智的國王
unwise measures 不明智的措施

meaning: 以一種不經意的方式；不經意地、不經意地、無意地、不知不覺地。
sentences: She realized to her horror that she had unwittingly helped those people she most despised. 她驚恐地意識到，自己無意間幫助了那些她最鄙視的人。
The team responded unwittingly to the change. 團隊不知不覺地對這項變化做出了反應。

meaning: 不值得；缺乏價值或優點；毫無價值的。
sentences: Something described as unworthy is not worthy; lacking value or merit; worthless. 被描述為不值得的東西是不值得的；缺乏價值或優點；毫無價值。
The word unworthy is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「不配」這個字常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 隱含或理解但未正式闡明。
sentences: It's an unwritten rule that you lock the gate when you leave the swimming pool. 離開游泳池時鎖門是一條不成文的規定。
Something described as unwritten is implicit or understood but not formally articulated. 被描述為不成文的東西是隱含的或理解的，但沒有正式闡明。
He looked up at the stars in the clear night sky. 他仰望晴朗夜空中的星星。
I usually wake up at 7:00 a.m. every day. 我通常每天早上七點起床。

meaning: 有快的節奏、節奏或節拍。
sentences: The notes are easy, but it's an upbeat tune and should be played fairly quickly. 音符很簡單，但它是一首歡快的曲子，應該彈得相當快。
Something described as upbeat is having a fast pace, tempo, or beat. 樂觀是指快節奏、快節奏或節拍。

meaning: 在相對不久的將來發生或出現。
sentences: We are ready for whatever is upcoming. 我們已準備好應對即將發生的一切。
The Federal budget lays out government spending for the upcoming budget year. 聯邦預算列出了即將到來的預算年度的政府支出。
Please make sure you update your software regularly to ensure security. 請務必定期更新您的軟體以確保安全。
The manager provided an update on the progress of the new project. 經理提供了新專案進展的最新（更新）情況。
The airline decided to upgrade her ticket to business class for free. 航空公司決定將她的機票免費升等（升級）到商務艙。
We need to upgrade our existing computer systems to improve efficiency. 我們需要升級現有的電腦系統以提高效率。

meaning: 爬上斜坡，走向更高的地面。
sentences: If someone acts uphill, they do so in a way that is up a slope, towards higher ground. 如果有人向上坡行動，他們會以爬上斜坡、朝向更高地的方式進行。
The speaker responded uphill during the discussion. 演講者在討論過程中做出了尖銳的回應。
To uphold means to hold up; to lift on high; to elevate. 堅持是堅持；舉到高處；提升。
People may uphold in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下堅持。
We decided to upholster the old armchair with new fabric. 我們決定用新布料重新裝飾那張舊扶手椅。
It takes skill to upholster a sofa properly. 正確地為沙發裝上墊子和飾面需要技巧。

meaning: 維護；使某物保持良好和工作狀態的行為或努力。
sentences: I would enjoy having a swimming pool, but I don't want to deal with the upkeep. 我希望擁有一個游泳池，但我不想負責維護工作。
The term upkeep refers to maintenance; the act or effort of keeping something in good and working condition. 維護一詞是指維護；使某物保持良好和工作狀態的行為或努力。
To uplift means to pick up; take possession of. 舉起的意思是拿起；擁有.
People may uplift in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下感到振奮。

meaning: 改善 心情 ；引起<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/cheerat="ivity titletle。
sentences: Listening to whalesong can be very uplifting. 聽鯨歌可以很 振奮人心 。 聆聽鯨魚的歌聲可以令人振奮。 聽鯨歌可以很振奮人心。
The report describes the result as uplifting. 報告稱這項結果令人振奮。 報告稱這項結果令人振奮。 報告稱這項結果令人振奮。
Please upload the finished report to the company's shared drive. 請將完成的報告上傳到公司的共享雲端硬碟。
It takes a few minutes to upload high-quality videos to YouTube. 將高品質影片上傳到 YouTube 需要幾分鐘時間。
Once upon a time, there lived a beautiful princess in a castle. 從前，有一位美麗的公主住在城堡裡。
The decision was based upon the latest scientific evidence available. 該決定是基於目前可獲得的最新科學證據。
The bedrooms are located on the upper floor of the new house. 臥室位於新房子的上層樓層。
She has experienced a lot of pain in her upper back lately. 她最近上背部一直感到很疼痛。
The old grandfather clock stood upright against the wooden wall.
He is a very upright man who always does the right and honest thing.
The government managed to put down the violent military uprising quickly.
The book explores the causes of the popular uprising in the city center.

meaning: 大聲、混亂的噪音，尤其是來自多個來源時。
sentences: The term uproar refers to loud, confused noise, especially when coming from several sources. 喧囂一詞指的是大聲、混亂的噪音，尤其是來自多個來源的噪音。
The lesson introduced uproar as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「騷動」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 價格昂貴，旨在吸引富裕消費者。
sentences: Something described as upscale is expensive and designed to appeal to affluent consumers. 所謂高檔的東西價格昂貴，旨在吸引富裕的消費者。
The word upscale is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 高檔這個詞通常用來形容人、事物或情況。
She was very upset when she heard the news about the accident. 聽到事故的消息時，她感到非常難過。
I'm sorry, I didn't mean to upset you with my earlier comment. 對不起，我不是故意要用剛才的話讓妳不開心的。
the upsettings of all their careful plans 他們所有精心策劃的打亂
The term upsetting refers to An overturning or disarrangement. 擾亂一詞指的是顛覆或混亂。

meaning: 某物的最高或最上面的側面或部分。
sentences: The term upside refers to the highest or uppermost side or portion of something. 術語“上側”是指某物的最高或最上面的側面或部分。
The lesson introduced upside as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「upside」作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The guest bedroom and bathroom are located upstairs. 客房和浴室位於樓上。
He ran upstairs to get his laptop and then came back down. 他跑上樓拿筆電，然後又下來了。
They went hunting in upstate New York. 他們去紐約州北部打獵。
Something described as upstate is of the northern section of a state. 所謂北部地區是指一個州的北部地區。

meaning: 比其他事情發生得更早；對其他事物有影響；造成其他事情的後果。
sentences: Input entry is upstream of input validation in the runtime process. 輸入條目是運行時進程中輸入驗證的上游。
The outage was caused by an upstream error in a payments library. 此次中斷是由支付庫中的上游錯誤引起的。

meaning: 生物體的吸收，尤其是食物或營養物質的吸收。
sentences: The term uptake refers to absorption, especially of food or nutrient by an organism. 攝取一詞是指吸收，尤其是生物體對食物或營養物質的吸收。
The lesson introduced uptake as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「吸收」是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 屬於富裕地區或人口的或與之相關的。
sentences: uptown problems 住宅區問題
Something described as uptown is of or relating to an affluent area or population. 被描述為住宅區的事物屬於富裕地區或人口或與之相關。
There has been a steady upward trend in the price of fuel recently.
The hikers followed the steep upward path to reach the mountain top.
The hot air balloon began to rise upward into the clear blue sky.
Please make sure you look upwards when you are climbing the ladder.

meaning: 原子序數92，符號U的元素。錒系放射性銀灰色金屬。
sentences: The term uranium refers to the element with atomic number 92 and symbol U. A radioactive silvery-grey metal in the actinide series. 鈾一詞是指原子序為92、符號為U的元素。錒系放射性銀灰色金屬。
The lesson introduced uranium as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了鈾作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The city is planning to improve its urban infrastructure system. 城市正計劃改善其城市基礎設施系統。
Modern urban life can be very exciting but also quite stressful. 現代城市生活可能非常刺激，但也相當充滿壓力。

meaning: 一個地區居住在城鎮的人口比例；這一比例的成長速度。
sentences: The term urbanization refers to the proportion of a region's population that live in towns and cities; the rate at which this proportion is growing. 都市化一詞是指一個地區居住在城鎮的人口比例；這一比例的成長速度。
The lesson introduced urbanization as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了城市化這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
I had a sudden urge to call my old friend and see how she was doing. 我突然有一種強烈渴望（衝動），想打電話給我的老朋友看看她過得怎麼樣。
The government urged people to stay at home during the heavy snowstorm. 政府敦促人們在暴風雪期間留在室內。
The doctor spoke with a sense of urgency regarding the patient's condition.
There is a growing sense of urgency about addressing climate change.
We need to take urgent action to address the problem of climate change. 我們需要採取緊急行動來應對氣候變遷問題。
He spoke in an urgent tone, telling us that we had to leave immediately. 他用急促的語氣說話，告訴我們必須立即離開。

meaning: 匆匆忙忙，帶著緊迫感，因為這非常重要。
sentences: We all urgently need to apply solutions to the problem of pollution. 我們都迫切需要採取解決污染問題的方法。
Funds are urgently required if this work is to be completed as planned. 如果這項工作要按計劃完成，急需資金。

meaning: 屬於、涉及、發生於或影響尿液、其產生、功能或排泄的。
sentences: Something described as urinary is of, relating to, occuring in, or affecting urine, its production, function, or excretion. 被描述為尿液的事物是指與尿液有關、發生在尿液中或影響尿液及其產生、功能或排泄的事物。
The word urinary is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 尿這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。
Our new puppy still urinates on the carpet, but we're housebreaking her. 我們的新小狗仍然在地毯上撒尿，但我們正在對她進行入室盜竊。
Boys on their campsite should avoid urinating within 200 feet of the lake. The word urinate is central here. 露營地的男孩應避免在距離湖 200 英尺的範圍內小便。排尿這個字是這裡的中心。

meaning: 液體廢物由水、鹽和尿素組成，在腎臟中產生，儲存在膀胱中，然後透過尿道釋放。
sentences: The term urine refers to liquid waste consisting of water, salts, and urea, which is made in the kidneys, stored in the bladder, then released through the urethra. 尿液一詞是指由水、鹽和尿素組成的液體廢物，在腎臟中產生，儲存在膀胱中，然後通過尿道釋放。
The lesson introduced urine as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了尿液作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 甕，缸，（煮茶或咖啡用的）大水壺
sentences: The ancient Greek urn was beautifully decorated with mythological scenes. 那個古希臘甕上裝飾著精美的神話場景。
The hotel provided a large silver urn filled with fresh coffee. 飯店提供了一個裝滿新鮮咖啡的大銀壺。

meaning: 易於使用；表現出良好的可用性。
sentences: Something described as usable is easy to use; exhibiting good usability. 被描述為可用的東西是指易於使用；表現出良好的可用性。
The word usable is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「可用」一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。
The dictionary provides examples of correct word usage in different contexts. 字典提供了不同語境下單字正確用法的範例。
The government is trying to reduce water usage during the summer months. 政府正試圖減少夏季期間的用水量。
Can I use your pen for a moment? Mine just ran out of ink. 我可以借用一下你的筆嗎？我的剛好沒水了。
The Internet is a powerful tool used for gathering information. 互聯網是用於蒐集資訊的強大工具。
He bought a used car after saving money for over a year. 存了一年多錢後，他買了一輛二手車。
This old laptop is used for simple tasks like writing and email. 這台舊筆電被用於處理寫作和郵件等簡單任務。
She gave me some very useful advice on how to save money. 她給了我一些關於如何省錢的非常實用的建議。
This new dictionary is extremely useful for language learners. 這本新字典對於語言學習者來說非常有用。
The usefulness of his latest reorganisation has been disputed. 他最近的重組是否有用一直存在爭議。
The term usefulness refers to The quality or degree of being useful. 術語“有用性”是指有用的品質或程度。

meaning: 沒有使用或沒有可能使用。
sentences: This fork's prongs are bent. It's useless now. 這把叉子的尖端是彎曲的。現在沒用了。
The report describes the result as useless. 報告稱該結果毫無用處。
The new software was designed to provide a better user experience. 這款新軟體旨在提供更好的使用者體驗。
Users are required to enter their password to access the system. 使用者被要求輸入密碼以造訪系統。
The usher showed us to our seats in the large movie theater.
The new discovery helped to usher in a new era of scientific research.
I'll meet you at our usual spot near the park entrance at noon. 我們中午在公園門口的老地方碰面吧。
The commute to work took longer than usual due to the heavy rain. 由於大雨，上班通勤時間比平時長。
I usually wake up early and go for a quick run in the park. 我通常早起並去公園慢跑。
The traffic is usually very heavy during the morning rush hour. 早上尖峰時段交通通常非常擁堵。

meaning: 通常透過非法手段從他人手中奪取權力。
sentences: People often usurp when the situation calls for it. 當情勢需要時，人們常常會篡奪權力。
Learning when to usurp helps you communicate more clearly. 了解何時篡奪可以幫助您更清晰地溝通。
The kitchen was equipped with all the necessary utensils for cooking.
Ancient stone utensils were found during the archaeological excavation.

meaning: 由同一個母親但不同的父親所生。
sentences: uterine siblings 子宮兄弟姊妹
Something described as uterine is born of the same mother but of a different father. 被描述為子宮的東西是由同一個母親但不同的父親所生的。

meaning: 子宮。女性體內孕育胎兒的器官。
sentences: The fetus develops inside the uterus during pregnancy. 懷孕期間，胎兒會在子宮內發育。
The doctor used an ultrasound to examine the uterus. 醫生使用超音波檢查子宮。
Something described as utilitarian is of or relating to utility. 被描述為功利主義的東西是屬於實用性的或與實用性相關的。
The word utilitarian is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 功利主義這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。
The new software is designed for maximum utility and ease of use. 這款新軟體的設計旨在實現最大效用和易用性。
The monthly utility bills, such as water and electricity, are quite high. 每月的水電費（公共設施費用）相當高。
We should learn how to utilize new technologies effectively in our work. 我們應該學會如何在工作中有效地利用新技術。
The project aims to utilize renewable energy sources to protect the environment. 該專案旨在利用可再生能源來保護環境。

meaning: 最極端的；最偉大的、終極的。
sentences: the utmost assiduity 最大的勤奮
the utmost harmony 最大的和諧

meaning: 一個萬物和每個人都完美和諧地工作的世界。
sentences: The term utopia refers to a world in which everything and everyone works in perfect harmony. 烏托邦一詞指的是一個一切事物、每個人都完美和諧地工作的世界。
The lesson introduced utopia as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了烏托邦這個術語，它是一個值得理解的有用術語。

meaning: 理想但往往不切實際；有遠見的。
sentences: a utopian project 一个乌托邦计划
Something described as utopian is ideal but often impractical; visionary. 被描述為烏托邦的東西是理想的，但往往不切實際；有遠見的。
The whole project turned out to be an utter failure and lost millions.
She couldn't utter a word after hearing the shocking news yesterday.
